emakefun_tts_init.message0: Initialize TTS module %1 I2C address %2 I2C interface %3
emakefun_tts_init.tooltip: Initialize Emakefun TTS speech synthesis module via I2C

emakefun_tts_play.tooltip: Convert text to speech and play, supports Chinese and English, max 250 bytes

emakefun_tts_push_cache.message0: TTS %1 push text %2 to cache block %3
emakefun_tts_push_cache.tooltip: Upload text to specified cache block, index range 0~15

emakefun_tts_play_cache.tooltip: Play from cache block 0, play count range 1~15
